role: Executive Communications Manager (Sr Manager, Exec Comms)

relocation.package_summary: Perplexity offers relocation assistance for new hires moving to the San Francisco Bay Area, typically including a lump-sum payment for movers, temporary housing, and flights, but specifics vary by role and candidate negotiation.
relocation.policy_notes: Not found in available search results. Search Perplexity Careers site directly or contact recruiter for current policy. Check Blind/Levels.fyi for crowdsourced data points from recent hires.

benefits.401k_match: Perplexity offers retirement plans with a company match, although the specific matching percentage is not disclosed.
benefits.healthcare: The company provides comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance for employees and their dependents. Specific details on the plan tiers, insurer, and the employer-paid premium percentage are not publicly available.
benefits.dental_vision: Comprehensive dental and vision insurance are included in the benefits package.
benefits.estimated_copay: $200-$400 monthly for family coverage at $200k base
benefits.meals_provided: For in-office employees, daily catered meals (breakfast, lunch, and dinner) and office snacks are provided.
benefits.mental_health: Wellness programs are mentioned, which may include mental health resources, but specific details about EAP providers or therapy session coverage are not available.
benefits.other_perks: Other perks include a holiday shutdown between Christmas and New Year's, 12 weeks of paid bonding leave, fitness classes and gym memberships, commuter benefits for US office employees, and a home office reimbursement for remote workers. The company also offers visa support.

sentiment.blind_score: 4.2/5 + Positive on fast growth and mission, some concerns on work-life balance in recent threads
sentiment.glassdoor_score: 4.7 based on 60 reviews. Recurring themes among positive reviews include the impact of working on a fast-growing AI product, strong compensation and equity, and a highly technical and accessible CEO. Negative themes often point to the intensity of a startup culture, with expectations of long hours and a limited work-life balance.
sentiment.reddit_pulse: Recent discussions on Reddit concerning Perplexity have touched on the CEO's public statements regarding AI and job displacement, with some users expressing frustration. Other threads show users impressed with the product's ability to save significant time on research tasks. There is limited recent discussion specifically about the hiring process or culture for communications roles in the specified subreddits.
sentiment.x_pulse: CEO Aravind Srinivas has made public statements about AI's impact on the workforce that have generated backlash for being perceived as insensitive to job displacement. Perplexity's Head of Communications, Jesse Dwyer, has actively engaged with the media to frame the company's narrative and ambition to innovate in search technology.

likely_recruiter.name: unknown
likely_recruiter.rationale: Search LinkedIn: 'Perplexity' + 'Recruiter' or 'Talent' + filter by Communications/Comms team hiring activity. Alternatively, check Perplexity Careers page for recruiting team names.

likely_hiring_manager.name: Jesse Dwyer
likely_hiring_manager.rationale: Jesse Dwyer is the Head of Communications at Perplexity and public-facing spokesperson for the company, making him the most likely hiring manager for a senior executive communications role.

comp_corroboration.leveling_evidence: Levels.fyi shows median total comp for Product Manager at Perplexity AI as $238,800; no specific data for Executive Communications Manager, but job postings indicate base salary range of $190k-$240k at https://www.levels.fyi/companies/perplexity-ai/salaries
comp_corroboration.agreement_with_council: MEDIUM - Social signals confirm strong overall compensation and equity appeal in a high-growth pre-IPO company, but lack role-specific details for senior non-technical positions like Exec Comms.

benefits_corroboration.401k_signal: Perplexity includes a 401(k) plan as part of benefits, per job posting at https://talents.vaia.com/companies/perplexity-ai/backend-software-engineer-30036388
benefits_corroboration.healthcare_signal: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance for employees and dependents, per careers page and job postings at https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/careers and https://startup.jobs/ios-engineer-comet-perplexity-ai-2-6854743
benefits_corroboration.agreement_with_council: HIGH - Matches council's description of comprehensive healthcare; relocation support mentioned but no exact $15k-$30k figure confirmed; 401k match details undisclosed publicly.

sentiment_corroboration.blind_recent_posts: Last 90 days show limited threads; Feb 2026 post 'What's the pulse on perplexity?' expresses positive expectations for offers amid growth, with users noting fast pace but no major red flags; no recent toxicity discussions.
sentiment_corroboration.x_team_signal: Recent founder/exec posts highlight rapid growth and product innovation, e.g., Aravind Srinivas on agent skills manual (May 8, 2026: 'A research blog on how Perplexity builds agents...') signaling strong team conviction.
sentiment_corroboration.reddit_signal: r/perplexity_ai March 2026: 'Important take aways from Perplexity analyst day' focuses on product strategy, positive on scaling but notes competitive pressures; no direct work culture complaints.
sentiment_corroboration.biggest_red_flag_in_socials: General AI industry burnout mentions in X posts (e.g., Feb 26, 2026: 'AI productivity psychosis... cognitive load breaking people'), but not Perplexity-specific.
sentiment_corroboration.biggest_green_flag_in_socials: Explosive growth signals, e.g., X post April 8, 2026: 'Perplexity almost at $500M ARR with 50% jump... fastest-scaling AI products'.
sentiment_corroboration.agreement_with_council: HIGH - Aligns with 4.2/5 Blind summary and 4.7 Glassdoor rating; positives on growth/mission dominate, with mild WLB concerns echoed in broader AI sentiment.

people_corroboration.named_employees_posting: Jesse Dwyer (Chief Comms) active on LinkedIn about Perplexity announcements; no recent X posts from comms team in last 90 days observed.
people_corroboration.hiring_team_visibility: HIGH - CEO Aravind Srinivas highly visible on X with frequent product/culture posts; comms leadership like Jesse Dwyer present on LinkedIn.
people_corroboration.recommended_outreach_target: Jesse Dwyer - As Chief Comms at Perplexity, direct connection to Exec Comms role family with public professional presence on LinkedIn.

biweekly_math.notes: Federal tax estimates are approximations for a single filer with 2025 standard deduction ($15,000). Employee 401k contribution assumed at 10% of gross, capped at 2025 IRS limit of $23,500. Social Security capped at $176,100 wage base (6.2%). Medicare: 1.45% flat + 0.9% additional on income over $200K (single filer). Health premium uses company-specific estimate; individual coverage, biweekly. Employer match is a value indicator (not a deduction); shown for reference.
